attributes.gen_ai.operation.name: chat
attributes.gen_ai.provider.name: openai
attributes.gen_ai.input.messages: [{"role": "user", "content": "What are the main features of Python?"}]
attributes.gen_ai.output.text: Python's main features include: 1) Easy to learn syntax, 2) Dynamic typing, 3) Extensive standard library, 4) Cross-platform compatibility, 5) Strong community support.

attributes.gen_ai.operation.name: chat
attributes.gen_ai.provider.name: openai
attributes.gen_ai.input.messages: [{"role": "user", "content": "What are the main features of JavaScript?"}]
attributes.gen_ai.output.text: JavaScript's main features include: 1) Event-driven programming, 2) Asynchronous execution with promises, 3) Prototype-based inheritance, 4) First-class functions, 5) Runs in browsers and Node.js.

attributes.gen_ai.operation.name: chat
attributes.gen_ai.provider.name: openai
attributes.gen_ai.input.messages: [{"role": "user", "content": "What are the main features of Rust?"}]
attributes.gen_ai.output.text: Rust's main features include: 1) Memory safety without garbage collection, 2) Zero-cost abstractions, 3) Ownership system, 4) Fearless concurrency, 5) Pattern matching and algebraic data types.

attributes.gen_ai.operation.name: chat
attributes.gen_ai.provider.name: openai
attributes.gen_ai.input.messages: [{"role": "user", "content": "Compare these languages based on the features you mentioned: Python's main features include: 1) Easy to learn syntax, 2) Dynamic typing, 3) Extensive standard library, 4) Cross-platform compatibility, 5) Strong community support. JavaScript's main features include: 1) Event-driven programming, 2) Asynchronous execution with promises, 3) Prototype-based inheritance, 4) First-class functions, 5) Runs in browsers and Node.js. Rust's main features include: 1) Memory safety without garbage collection, 2) Zero-cost abstractions, 3) Ownership system, 4) Fearless concurrency, 5) Pattern matching and algebraic data types."}]
attributes.gen_ai.output.text: Comparison: Python excels in ease of use and rapid development. JavaScript dominates web development with its event-driven model. Rust provides the best performance and memory safety. Python and JavaScript use garbage collection while Rust uses ownership. All three have strong communities but serve different niches: Python for data science/scripting, JavaScript for web, Rust for systems programming.
